incidents.title: Index migration without CONCURRENTLY locked orders table for 14 minutes
incidents.root_cause: CREATE INDEX without CONCURRENTLY acquired exclusive table lock, blocking all writes on orders table during migration
incidents.resolution: Killed migration, rewrote using CREATE INDEX CONCURRENTLY. Added DBA review gate.

incidents.title: Schema migration caused unexpected p99 spike during canary — caught before promotion
incidents.root_cause: New composite index on large table triggered buffer pool thrashing during canary. Detected via telemetry monitoring before promotion.
incidents.resolution: Rolled back canary, rewrote index migration with partial index to reduce buffer pressure. Redeployed with full monitoring.
